canonical_definition: A high-precision eye-tracking dataset for chart question answering that pairs chart images and questions with human gaze annotations.

definitions.text: A dataset created for evaluating and enhancing chart understanding in LVLMs, which includes charts and corresponding human eye-tracking data.
